lines.speaker: Mort'ton local
lines.text: Oh I feel much better for that super serum, I really hate it when I'm afflicted!

lines.speaker: Mort'ton local
lines.text: Oh... thank you, you used the serum on me. Here have something for your trouble.

lines.speaker: Mort'ton local
lines.text: Oh... thank you, you used the permanent serum on me. Here have something for your trouble.
